working_on: Fix Issue #153 — session-close friction mitigations (Fixes A+C+D+E)

outcome_summary: Issue #153 session-close friction mitigation package landed (Fixes A+C+D+E from the Issue body's six candidates; B + F named in ADR 0099 Alternatives Considered as deferred follow-ups). Six commits: eager-claim (cc99629); engine ADR 0099 session-close-friction-mitigations + engine/adr/README.md index row + decisions drawer c0ec3dfc (7746b21); Fix A — CLOSE_ALLOWED_GLOBS widened by engine/adr/README.md + product/adr/README.md in routine_lifecycle_push.py + structural-test extension + new test_close_accepts_adr_readme_edit (6/6 close-shape tests pass) (510876f); Fix C — auto-apply ruff format on staged Python files BEFORE validate.py --code-gates in engine/tools/hooks/pre-commit + defense-in-depth scrub_env.sh sourcing for venv-PATH wiring (7b2884e); Fix D — extend post-adr-write.sh with ADR-README index consistency check (routes by partition) + new post-changelog-write.sh for 200-char summary cap reminder + wire in .claude/settings.json PostToolUse block + 8/8 tests pass (72e6ce6); Fix E — new Step 5b 'Verify staged + unstaged paths against the close allowlist' in session-shutdown-sequence.md + Skill mirror, parity-check verified clean (15/15 tests pass, including real_repo_smoke) (6e76dd6). ADR 0099 carries 5 Load-bearing premises per ADR 0084 extraction step (criterion #4 fires: 7 surfaces in Consequences). First natural exercise of Step 5b during this session's own close confirmed clean — only engine/session/current.json modified (operational allowlist member). Cold-review pass (Python/engine): skipped per scope — changes are bounded (CLOSE_ALLOWED_GLOBS tuple expansion + 2 test files); spot-check covered contract-vs-code consistency. Issue #154 filed mid-session for check_settings_sync.py bidirectional-assumption bug — worktree's settings.json was canonical correct; main was stale; check told user to copy wrong direction; classifier denied both sync directions; user authorized inverse-direction cp manually. Sibling failure mode in Issue #153's same class but not in the Issue body's enumerated three. User pushback captured (drawer fcd3e824). Lesson captured: worktrees share parent .git/hooks/ via symlink — hook content edits don't take effect in worktree commits until main repo's working tree FFs (drawer 1e3071aa). 6 engine_memory calls (search 1, diary_read 1, diary_write 1 [c2dfb077bbe948d79ac21c54698226e8], add_drawer 3: decisions c0ec3dfc5b504c8caa767fcb03ace8fb (ADR 0099) + pushback fcd3e824a0344985b1a2aaccd39ab007 (user reframe) + lesson 1e3071aa4221482a88ed9a2a20162001 (worktree symlink fallback)). 8 issue_collision soft-warns per commit (Issue #153 correctly + 7 false-positive keyword matches). Final-check soft-warns: existing graph-state inheritance (358 missing_rigor_score + 46 edge_evidence_empty + 533 edge_contestability_unguarded_high_confidence per the S-0208 baseline + 1 engine_memory_zero_citations_after_search that clears after this outcome_summary fill). Acceptance criterion 4 observation window opened at this close — 3 consecutive clean closes needed; this session = sample 1.
